text:
Created attachment 221306
patch to update the port

- Update 1.35 --> 1.36
Changes: https://github.com/mrscotty/connector/compare/1.35...1.36

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with:
12.2-RELEASE-p2
pkg 1.16.1
poudriere 3.3.6
perl 5.32.0
openssl 1.1.1h
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
